13.reason: [Using a global variable 'depth' for tracking node height is incorrect because it doesn't reflect the actual depth of each node during traversal; it gets modified globally during recursion, leading to wrong height values for leaf nodes.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.25 , reason:  [Using a global variable 'depth' for tracking node height is incorrect because it doesn't reflect the actual depth of each node during traversal; it gets modified globally during recursion, leading to wrong height values for leaf nodes.]

45.reason: [Printing the global 'depth' instead of the actual depth of the current node. The global 'depth' does not correctly represent the height of the current leaf node due to shared state across recursive calls.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.25 , reason:  [Printing the global 'depth' instead of the actual depth of the current node. The global 'depth' does not correctly represent the height of the current leaf node due to shared state across recursive calls.]

48.reason: [Incorrectly incrementing a global 'depth' variable before recursing; this affects all recursive paths and leads to inconsistent and incorrect depth values. Depth should be passed as a parameter.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.25 , reason:  [Incorrectly incrementing a global 'depth' variable before recursing; this affects all recursive paths and leads to inconsistent and incorrect depth values. Depth should be passed as a parameter.]

53.reason: [Decrementing global 'depth' after recursion unwinds, but this still fails to maintain correct per-path depth because multiple branches interfere with the same global variable.]
